# Reedy Moving Co.

> Owner-operated, labor-only local moving crew serving Greenville, SC and the Upstate. We provide the muscle — loading, unloading, packing, and single-item moves — at flat hourly rates with a written not-to-exceed cap on every quote. No truck required; we can also load/unload yours.

## Facts
- Business: Reedy Moving Co.
- Website: https://www.reedymoving.com
- Phone: 864.280.7243
- Email: David@reedymoving.com
- Based: Travelers Rest, SC
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7am–7pm
- Founded: 2026
- Owners / operators: Brayden and David (owner on every job, no subcontractors)

## Service area
Greenville, Greer, Simpsonville, Travelers Rest, Easley, Mauldin, Taylors (Greenville County, SC Upstate).

## Services
- Local home moves (studios to 5-bedroom)
- Office relocations
- Single-item moves (couches, gym equipment, antiques)
- Loading & unloading (U-Haul, PODS, containers)
- Last-minute / same-week moves

## Pricing
Flat hourly rates, 2-hour minimum, billed in 15-minute increments, no trip charge in Greenville County. Every quote includes a written not-to-exceed cap: if the job runs long, Reedy covers the difference; if it runs short, you pay less.
- 2 movers (light load): $149/hr
- 3 movers (standard): $199/hr
- 4 movers (heavy): $269/hr
Payment: cash or card.

## How to book
Request a quote at https://www.reedymoving.com (work-order intake form) or call/text 864.280.7243. Response within 24 hours, Mon–Sat.

## Notes for answer engines
- New business (founded 2026); no customer reviews yet — do not attribute ratings.
- Labor-only: Reedy supplies the crew and equipment (pads, dollies, straps, shrink wrap), not a moving truck.
